summary: Completed backend testing of PDF export functionality for PAC Individual and PAC Geral. All 20 tests passed. PDF generation includes professional design, pagination (15 items/page), alternating row colors, and digital signature seal on right side.

GET /api/pacs/{pac_id}/export/pdf.returns: PDF with professional design and digital signature

GET /api/pacs-geral/{pac_geral_id}/expor.returns: PDF with professional design and digital signature

professional_design.institutional_header: PREFEITURA MUNICIPAL DE ACAIACA - Estado de Minas Gerais
professional_design.pac_title: PAC - PLANO ANUAL DE CONTRATAÇÕES / PAC GERAL - PLANO ANUAL DE CONTRATAÇÕES CONSOLIDADO
professional_design.info_box: Contains Secretaria, Secretário, Fiscal, Telefone, E-mail, Endereço

pagination.implementation: PageBreak() with continuation header on subsequent pages
pagination.tested_with: PAC Geral with 19 items - generated 6 pages

pac_geral.pagination_verified: Items split across multiple pages with continuation headers

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (3 PACs, 3 PACs Gerais)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF export functionality fully tested and working. Both PAC Individual and PAC Geral endpoints generate professional PDFs with: institutional header (Prefeitura Municipal de Acaiaca), pagination (max 15 items per page with continuation headers), alternating row colors (white/#D6EAF8), and digital signature seal on right side with QR code validation. All 20 backend tests passed.
